description: Permissions for the tauri-plugin-connector dev tooling. Lives outside `capabilities/` so tauri-build's default `./capabilities/**/*` glob does NOT auto-load it. Registered at runtime via `app.add_capability(include_str!(...))` in `src/lib.rs`, gated on `cfg(feature = "dev-connector")`. Plain `tauri dev` / `tauri build` skip the feature, so neither the plugin nor this capability are loaded — release builds no longer need to delete this file.
